description: Coulson, May, Skye, and Triplett fight their way out from the barbershop confrontation, using the Berserker staff and clever tactics. Skye retrieves vital data, while May brings down the structure on the soldiers, allowing the team to escape and regroup, showcasing their resourcefulness in a dire situation.

transcript.line: Could sure use a little light in here.
So, who do we talk to about getting a haircut?
Bring the house down. Time to go!
Come on. Let's go. Let's go.
